마가복음 16:1.content: When the Sabbath was past, Mary Magdalene, and Mary the mother of James, and Salome, bought spices, that they might come and anoint him.

마가복음 16:2.content: Very early on the first day of the week, they came to the tomb when the sun had risen.

마가복음 16:3.content: They were saying among themselves, “Who will roll away the stone from the door of the tomb for us?”

마가복음 16:4.content: for it was very big. Looking up, they saw that the stone was rolled back.

마가복음 16:5.content: Entering into the tomb, they saw a young man sitting on the right side, dressed in a white robe, and they were amazed.

마가복음 16:6.content: He said to them, “Don’t be amazed. You seek Jesus, the Nazarene, who has been crucified. He has risen. He is not here. Behold, the place where they laid him!

마가복음 16:7.content: But go, tell his disciples and Peter, ‘He goes before you into Galilee. There you will see him, as he said to you.’ ”

마가복음 16:8.content: They went out, and fled from the tomb, for trembling and astonishment had come on them. They said nothing to anyone; for they were afraid.

마가복음 16:9.content: Now when he had risen early on the first day of the week, he appeared first to Mary Magdalene, from whom he had cast out seven demons.

마가복음 16:10.content: She went and told those who had been with him, as they mourned and wept.

마가복음 16:11.content: When they heard that he was alive, and had been seen by her, they disbelieved.

마가복음 16:12.content: After these things he was revealed in another form to two of them, as they walked, on their way into the country.

마가복음 16:13.content: They went away and told it to the rest. They didn’t believe them, either.

마가복음 16:14.content: Afterward he was revealed to the eleven themselves as they sat at the table, and he rebuked them for their unbelief and hardness of heart, because they didn’t believe those who had seen him after he had risen.

마가복음 16:15.content: He said to them, “Go into all the world, and preach the Good News to the whole creation.

마가복음 16:16.content: He who believes and is baptized will be saved; but he who disbelieves will be condemned.

마가복음 16:17.content: These signs will accompany those who believe: in my name they will cast out demons; they will speak with new languages;

마가복음 16:18.content: they will take up serpents; and if they drink any deadly thing, it will in no way hurt them; they will lay hands on the sick, and they will recover.”

마가복음 16:19.content: So then the Lord, after he had spoken to them, was received up into heaven, and sat down at the right hand of God.

마가복음 16:20.content: They went out, and preached everywhere, the Lord working with them, and confirming the word by the signs that followed. Amen.
